---
title: "Rachel Anderson"
subtitle: "Financial Economics Student | FAA-Licensed Private Pilot"
---

Winston-Salem, NC | [rachel00anderson@gmail.com](mailto:rachel00anderson@gmail.com) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rachel-anderson--)

## Summary

FAA-licensed private pilot and Financial Economics student (3.9 GPA) with hands-on experience in variance and cost analysis, forecasting, account reconciliation, and financial reporting. Advanced Excel and VBA, with a record of building financial models and automated reports.

## Skills

**Financial Analysis:** variance and cost analysis, forecasting and modeling (revenue, expense, cash flow), budgeting, financial reporting and KPIs, income statement and balance sheet analysis, investment and risk analysis

**Software and Tools:** Excel (advanced VBA, Power Query), Microsoft Office Suite, QuickBooks, Bloomberg Terminal, Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau

**Accounting Operations:** account reconciliation, payment processing, monthly billing and payroll support, data validation, process improvement

## Professional Experience

### Teaching Assistant, Financial Modeling | Brigham Young University–Idaho

*Rexburg, ID | May 2026 – Present*

- Selected by the professor to help build a new Financial Modeling course; grade and validate 30+ students' Excel/VBA financial models, ensuring accurate and consistent evaluation.
- Work with the professor to integrate AI into model building and to design assignments that test understanding while reducing his workload.

### Sales Advisor | Tesla, Inc.

*Idaho Falls, ID | August 2025 – February 2026*

- Advised 1,000+ clients on pricing and financing options across test drives, contributing to an estimated $1.5M+ in influenced sales.
- Designed an Excel/VBA CRM to track conversions and follow-ups, ensuring no client opportunity went unaddressed.

### Administrative Assistant | Teton Valley Lodge

*Driggs, ID | May 2024 – August 2025*

- Processed high-value customer payments for a multi-million-dollar lodge operation using QuickBooks and Excel, keeping financial records accurate across all transactions.
- Built Excel systems to manage payroll and tip allocation of $10,000+ per pay period across 75+ employees, and organized monthly billing and receipts.

### Receptionist | Foothills Rehabilitation

*Idaho Falls, ID | May 2024 – January 2025*

- Processed insurance claims and patient payments with full accuracy, verifying coverage, reconciling balances, and resolving discrepancies in compliance with office procedures.

### Sales and Product Flow Assistant | Best Buy Co., Inc.

*Logan, UT | September 2022 – January 2024*

- Tracked sales and inventory data across 8+ departments to benchmark store performance against other locations nationwide and guide restocking decisions.

## Projects

- **ExxonMobil Equity Research** (Bloomberg Terminal, Excel): analyzed revenue and cost trends across the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow; built a CFA-style valuation from comparables, beta, and analyst consensus.
- **U.S. Treasury Bond Pricing Model** (Excel, VBA): fixed-income pricing tool with a custom yield-curve interpolation function that generates a recurring automated daily PDF report.
- **Real Estate and Mortgage Model** (Excel): 360-month cash-flow forecast with dynamic PMI lookup and refinance break-even and rate-buydown scenario analysis.
- **Automated Stock Alert Monitor** (Excel, VBA, Gmail): tracks live prices against preset targets and sends automated email alerts when actuals cross thresholds; built to keep working through any sheet edits.

## Education

### Brigham Young University–Idaho

*Rexburg, ID | Expected April 2027*

B.S., Financial Economics; Minor: Business Analytics; GPA 3.9. Coursework: Advanced Financial Management, Managerial Economics, Econometrics, Data Science Programming (Python).

### Utah State University

*Logan, UT | August 2023*

A.S., Aviation Technology; FAA Private Pilot; 100+ flight hours.

## Certifications

- FAA Private Pilot (2022)
- Bloomberg Market Concepts (2026)
- Data Science Certificate, BYU–Idaho (2026)
- Business Fundamentals, BYU–Idaho (2025)
- In progress: SAP S/4HANA finance fundamentals coursework (SAP Learning)

## Volunteer Experience

**Volunteer English Teacher** | International Language Programs, Vanuatu — taught 50+ students abroad (February – May 2024)
